title: Clean Adult East Asian Lifestyle Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Clean Adult East Asian Lifestyle Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 clean cinematic lifestyle portrait of 25-30 year-old East Asian woman with natural slim oval face and calm eye contact. Subject: 25-30 year-old East Asian woman with natural slim oval face and calm eye contact wears soft ivory ribbed knit top with high-waisted linen lounge pants and holds sitting sideways on the bed edge, one hand resting on the blanket, shoulders relaxed, with natural proportions, calm expression, realistic skin texture, and clearly adult presentation. Scene: quiet apartment bedroom near a sheer-curtain window provides a minimal real-life interior with clean walls, restrained styling, and quiet domestic atmosphere. Composition: Vertical 9:16 lifestyle portrait with thigh-up or seated framing, relaxed shoulders, natural hands, realistic body proportion, uncluttered background, and calm cinematic stillness. Signature Elements: Clean face, natural East Asian features, calm gaze, simple real-life wardrobe, quiet room, restrained adult attractiveness, soft lifestyle mood, accurate hands and limbs, and minimal background. Fixed source details: Light Mood: overcast morning window light, gentle shadows, airy room brightness. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Low-saturation cool white, soft grey-white, pale beige-grey, natural skin tones, and restrained clean neutral wardrobe color. Lighting: fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, soft low-contrast illumination, gentle shadows, clear body contour edges, and natural skin texture without plastic smoothing. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Keep the subject clearly adult, modest, clean, non-explicit, not underage, not eroticized, and not over-stylized;

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
